curriculum.title: Factors, Multiples, and Primes
curriculum.summary: Prime tests, common multiples, and factor structure.

curriculum.title: Fraction Operations
curriculum.summary: Add, subtract, compare, and scale fractions.

curriculum.title: Decimals and Percents
curriculum.summary: Convert, compare, and use percent as per hundred.

curriculum.title: Ratio and Rate
curriculum.summary: Scale recipes, unit rates, and ratio tables.

curriculum.title: Expressions and Equations
curriculum.summary: Use variables, balance equations, and simplify expressions.

curriculum.title: Area and Volume
curriculum.summary: Composite area, rectangle volume, and surface patterns.

curriculum.title: Angles and Geometry
curriculum.summary: Angle sums, polygons, and triangle properties.

curriculum.title: Divisibility and Remainders
curriculum.summary: Divisibility tests, quotient-remainder, and packing logic.

curriculum.title: Coordinates and Graphs
curriculum.summary: Coordinate reading, graph trends, and table interpretation.

curriculum.title: Probability and Counting
curriculum.summary: Count outcomes, compare probabilities, and reason from constraints.

curriculum.title: Sequences and Patterns
curriculum.summary: Growing patterns, recursive rules, and arithmetic sequences.

curriculum.title: Logic, Sets, and Strategy
curriculum.summary: Set membership, elimination, parity, and invariant-style ideas.
